description: Phase 22 scan_emitter_registry: every reports/n6_*.json file must be produced by an active emitter — either the out="reports/n6_<name>.json" pattern in tool/_n6_lib, a direct writer (currently only health → n6_health.json), or the legacy allowlist (ad-hoc audit artifacts). Orphan files signal a scanner was removed without cleaning up its output, or a typo left a stale file.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_emitter_registry.json ] && jq -r "if .orphan_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_emitter_registry.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
